title: VYKPack
description: A modpack featuring some of my favorite mods
body: ## VYKPack A collection of mods, designed for both survival and creative. ### Mod Credits: - [Pick Your Poison](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pick-your-poison) - Made by doctor4t on CurseForge. - [Xaero's World Map](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-world-map) - Made by xaero96 on CurseForge. - [Terralith](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/terralith) - Made by Starmute on CurseForge. - [Illuminations](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/illuminations) - Made by doctor4t on CurseForge - [Effective](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/effective) - Made by doctor4t on CurseForge - [Compact Help Command](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/compact-help-command-fabric) - Made by Serilum on CurseForge - [First Join Message](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/first-join-message-fabric) - Made by Serilum on CurseForge - [Campfire Spawn and Tweaks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/campfire-spawn-and-tweaks) - Made by Serilum on CurseForge - [Bouncier Beds](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bouncier-beds-fabric) - Made by Serilum on CurseForge
